description: Style NoteRefresh your formal wardrobe with this shirt from arrow. This piece gives a face lift to your on-duty staples with its flattering cut and impeccable silhouette. It sits well under a structured blazer for dressy occasions. Wear this with dark or light chinos to alternate between looks when you're heading to work, and style with formal shoes from provogue, available online at myntra. For a stylish fusion of formal and casual, wear this with classic denims, a bold belt and matching casual leather shoes.Product DetailsBlue and white checked half sleeved formal shirt, has a full buttoned placket with a spread collar and a patch pocket with a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonWash careMachine wash warm with like coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm ironDo not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18'' ) is wearing size M
